app.title: Soil tiller calculator
speed_step_prompt: Set speed search step in km/h:
about.title: About
about.subtitle: Details about the current build and runtime environment.
about.updates_current: You are running the latest version
about.author: Author
depth_warning: Depth is outside 5-20 cm. Using 10 cm.
depth_limits_warning: Depth limits are invalid. Using 5-20 cm.
speed_warning: Speed is outside 5-12 km/h. Using 8 km/h.
speed_limits_warning: Speed limits are invalid. Using 5-12 km/h.
speed_step_warning: Optimization step is invalid. Using 0.5 km/h.
custom_speed_limits_tz_warning: Attention: custom speed limits make the calculation differ from the assignment. The assignment requires a strict 5-12 km/h range and automatically uses 8 km/h for invalid input.
custom_depth_limits_tz_warning: Attention: custom depth limits make the calculation differ from the assignment. The assignment requires a strict 5-20 cm range and automatically uses 10 cm for invalid input.
result_legend_force: F - traction force, N. Shows the force needed to pull one tool through soil.
result_legend_resistance: q - specific resistance, N/m. Force divided by tool width; lower is better for comparison.
result_legend_power: P - drawbar power, kW. Mechanical power required at the selected speed.
result_legend_fuel: Q - fuel consumption, l/h. Estimated diesel consumption for one tool.
optimal_line: Optimal speed: {speed:.1f} km/h; q min: {q:.2f} N/m
tool_result: {name}: F={force:.2f} N; q={q:.2f} N/m; P={power:.4f} kW; Q={fuel:.4f} l/h
force_title: Traction force vs speed at {depth:.1f} cm
tools.title: Tool manager
tools.name: Name
tools.points: Reference points speed:force, one per line
tools.builtin_note: Built-in tools cannot be edited. Duplicate them first.
matplotlib_missing: matplotlib is not installed. Install project dependencies to show graphs.
